.github/workflows/ci.yml#runner-policy.justification: Policy enforcement stays on independent GitHub-hosted compute so malformed local-routing changes cannot disable their own gate.

.github/workflows/ci.yml#ci-status.justification: The required status gateway remains independent of local capacity while aggregating every workload result.

.github/workflows/claude-review.yml#revi.justification: Automated review mints a Claude token and writes pull-request feedback, so it remains on GitHub-hosted infrastructure.

.github/workflows/link-check.yml#link-ch.justification: The scheduled link monitor can write its tracking issue and remains on GitHub-hosted infrastructure.

.github/workflows/pr-title.yml#pr-title.justification: The independently required PR-title gate remains hosted so local fleet availability cannot suppress its check.

.github/workflows/publish-packages.yml#p.justification: Package publication has packages:write authority and must remain on GitHub-hosted infrastructure.

.github/workflows/sync.yml#sync.justification: Standards synchronization uses GitHub App credentials to open cross-repository pull requests and remains hosted.
